name: TrainingDatasetBuilder

neutralConcepts: F423 IPIIMaskingService PLATFORM-ONLY — PII masking executes BEFORE dataset export
Dataset is tenant-scoped — no cross-tenant data leakage permitted
featureCount must be validated (>= 1) before emitting TrainingDatasetReady
rowCount must be validated (>= 1) before emitting TrainingDatasetReady

ironRules.rule: Dataset is tenant-scoped — no cross-tenant data leakage. Every query must include tenantId predicate.
F423 IPIIMaskingService PLATFORM-ONLY — PII masking executes BEFORE dataset export. Unmasked PII must never reach the exported dataset.
featureCount must be validated >= 1 before emitting TrainingDatasetReady. Zero-feature datasets must return failure.
rowCount must be validated >= 1 before emitting TrainingDatasetReady. Empty datasets must return failure.

keywords: training dataset builder PII masking tenant-scoped feature count row count validation analytics warehouse machine learning
